prompts.purpose: Extract QCM candidates from a single page using previous/current/next page context.
Detect metadata and Cas Clinique groupings inside combined Step 2.
Extract correction maps from human-reviewed correction pages.
Detect highlighted correction marks and link them to QCM numbers.
Scan all pages for correction-like patterns and apply extracted correction maps.
Plan document map, generated configs, and concise evidence summaries for AI Auto Run.
Evaluate AI Auto Run outputs and request manual intervention or safe stop when needed.
